expectations.text: GroupHeaderTemplate shows category name and item count
expectations.evidence:
<Label Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding CategoryName}" Style="{StaticResource CategoryHeaderStyle}" ... />
<Label Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding ItemCount, StringFormat='{0} item(s)'}" Style="{StaticResource ItemCountStyle}" ... />

expectations.text: Price is formatted as currency (StringFormat with C, or similar currency formatting)
expectations.evidence: <Label Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat='{0:C}'}" Style="{StaticResource PriceStyle}" ... />

expectations.text: An 'Add to Cart' button has a Command binding
expectations.evidence: <Button ... Style="{StaticResource AddToCartButtonStyle}" Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:CatalogViewModel}}, Path=AddToCartCommand}" CommandParameter="{Binding .}" ... />

expectations.text: Pull-to-refresh is implemented via RefreshView or IsBusy pattern
CollectionView has an EmptyView defined for the no-results state
expectations.evidence:
<CollectionView.EmptyView>
  <VerticalStackLayout ...>
    <Label Text="No products found" ... />
    <Label Text="Pull down to refresh and check again." ... />
  </VerticalStackLayout>
</CollectionView.EmptyView>

expectations.text: ViewModel uses a grouped collection structure (ObservableCollection of group objects)
